next_steps: Perform extensive paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis antibody panel in serum and CSF
Obtain whole-body PET/CT scan to screen for occult malignancy
Initiate high-dose intravenous corticosteroids for suspected autoimmune etiology
Consider brain biopsy if initial workup remains inconclusive
Maintain anti-seizure medication due to temporal lobe epileptiform activity

differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune encephalitis (e.g., LGI1 or GAD65 antibody-associated)
next_steps: Send serum and CSF for autoimmune and paraneoplastic encephalitis antibody panels
Perform CSF RT-QuIC for prion disease
Obtain whole-body PET/CT scan to screen for occult malignancy
